creator: wpaul@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


The 3c90x adapters, including the 3c905B, is now supported by the 
XL (if_xl) driver. This driver has just been imported to -current 
and should appear in RELENG_2_2 in a week or so. You can obtain source 
for the driver for FreeBSD-current and FreeBSD 2.2.x along with 
instructions on how to make a new kernel with the XL driver included 
at http://www.freebsd.org/~wpaul/3Com.
